posts.title: GR11
posts.content: I am planning to walk the GR11 trail in Spain.  I will post updates to this website along the way.

posts.title: Days 1 - 3
posts.content:
I have finally started the GR11. After a quick stop in New York, I made my way to Irún, on the western coast of Spain, and started my walk 3 days ago. I'm now in a town called Elizondo, which is 60 km in.

I'm enjoying the trail so far. The heat has not been an issue. The heat dome that was sitting over Western Europe has eased, and the temperatures are far less extreme than what I experienced in the desert of the PCT. I hope it stays that way! There are plenty of water sources, so I never have to carry more than about a liter at a time.
